productDisplayName: Carlton London Women Chocolate Brown and Gold Toned Flats
description: A pair of chocolate brown, open round-toed flats with crystal and metal embellishments Two forefoot straps and two buckled ankle loops with a strap connecting the ankle loops and forefoot straps, narrow heel collar Soft and smooth footbed Upper adhered to the outsole Textured rubber outsole with a short heel with a textured heel cap
